creator: transitive@gmail.com
text:
The devel/autogen port fails to build on my system. The attached synth log shows how it fails.

Below is an excerpt of the build log showing where it fails:

Imv -f .deps/autogen-ag.Tpo .deps/autogen-ag.Po
/bin/sh ../libtool  --tag=CC   --mode=link cc -I/usr/local/include/guile/2.0 -I/usr/local/include -D_THREAD_SAFE -pthread  -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -export-dynamic  -fstack-protector -o autogen  autogen-ag.o ../autoopts/libopts.la ../snprintfv/libsnprintfv.la -L/usr/local/lib -lguile-2.0 -lgc-threaded  -Wl,-rpath -Wl,/usr/local/lib -lm -lm
